title: Lazy Crafting
description: A vanilla-oriented data pack adding some convenient crafting recipes.
body:
**# What is this data pack exactly?**
This data pack streamlines your crafting process. For example, in vanilla Minecraft when crafting 4 chests, you must first turn 8 logs into 32 planks, then craft those planks into 4 chests. With this data pack installed, you can directly craft 4 chests from 8 logs – with many more optimized recipes added.

**# What does this data pack add?**
This data pack adds hundreds of recipes, all viewable in the integrated gallery.
**_（Log-based items such as chests support all log types: including stripped logs, bark blocks, and Nether variants.）_**
_**（Plank-based oak items can be substituted with the same wood species to craft corresponding variants.）**_
